_comment: Skill-bundle manifest (TECH-DEBT-REGISTRY row 36, pattern: anthropics/financial-services). 'bundles' maps each LLM-surface service to the canonical skills synced into services/<service>/prompts/skills/ by scripts/sync_agent_skills.py. 'inline_consumers' maps files that carry an inlined copy of a skill (prompt templates, prompt-loading constants in .py, promptfoo configs) to the skills whose canonical lines they must contain verbatim — enforced by scripts/ci/check_skill_drift.py.
